nightfall_pearl.name: Nightfall Pearl
nightfall_pearl.desc: I can spend 10 minutes to activate this his 6-inch-diameter, jet-black orb, causing the area within 10 miles of it to become night even if it is daytime. This night lasts for 24 hours, until I cancel it as an action, or until my attunement to the pearl ends. Once used, the pearl can't be used again for 24 hours.
